overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person exploration of Night City at night. The clip begins with walking along the NCART station covered walkway, transitions to crossing an open intersection toward a hotel, then shifts to driving through neon-lit downtown streets with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian walkway beside the NCART station, observing the neon-lit street to the left

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the green pathway carrying a bag

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'NCART' with 'Night City Area Rapid Transit' subtitle
overhanging concrete roof with linear neon strip lighting along the edge
tall building with illuminated 'HOTEL' signage in purple neon
lit vending machine with red and white graphics near the station entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sheltered pedestrian walkway of the NCART station in Night City. The path is illuminated by cyan neon strip lights under the concrete overhang, while the street with sparse traffic runs parallel to the left. The purple neon HOTEL sign is visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection approaching hotel building

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street with full view of hotel building and night sky
crossing the multi-lane asphalt road while vehicles pass by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking across the open intersection toward the hotel building, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the road as ego crosses

entered.detail: street sign displaying speed limit of 40 on a metal pole
tropical palm trees lining the median between road and sidewalk
tall building with vertical red neon signage in Asian characters

segments.scene_description: Having exited the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection under the night sky with the moon visible. The camera approaches the tall HOTEL building with its purple neon signage while crossing the asphalt road. Palm trees line the street, and red neon vertical signs illuminate a distant skyscraper on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street with holographic advertisements

events.description: transition from walking to driving a vehicle on the multi-lane city street

agents.ego_description: driving through Night City streets at moderate speed, navigating between other vehicles and following the road

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large vertical holographic advertisement displaying animated content on building facade
orange and white striped construction barriers lining the right side of the road
elevated highway structure crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Now driving through the neon-drenched downtown streets of Night City from a first-person vehicle perspective. The road is flanked by towering skyscrapers with bright red vertical neon signage and massive holographic billboards. Traffic flows moderately with various vehicles, and orange construction barriers line the right side of the asphalt road as the camera approaches an overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person progression from a sheltered pedestrian walkway into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of downtown Night City. It begins under the concrete overhang of the NCART station, moving along a path illuminated by cyan neon strips while a purple hotel sign glows in the distance. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection under a moonlit sky, crossing the asphalt road past palm trees toward the towering hotel building. The perspective then shifts seamlessly into a vehicle, accelerating through the city center where the environment transforms into a canyon of skyscrapers adorned with massive holographic billboards and red vertical signage. The movement finally carries the camera past orange construction barriers and flowing traffic as it approaches a looming urban overpass.
